title: Custom Glint
description: Allows you to change your armor/tools enchant glint live to anything, Allows for custom textures + end gateway shader effect and old enchant glint style toggle as well as enchant bloom works with vulkan mod
body:
**Custom Glint**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Custom Glint is a client-side mod that lets you customize enchant glints for items and armor, You can use the built in glints or add your own glints by putting PNG files into the glint folder. For more glints join my discord! The biggest thing with this mod is that it works with Vulkan Mod, so you can still use custom glints, shader overlays, and bloom while playing with Vulkan. It also works without Vulkan incase you just prefer the mod normally. but vulkan increases preformance a ton. even though the mod is pretty light weight to run since its so optimized. Full version = 1.21.11 and up, **lower versions have less features for now** due to it would look very bad and a ton of work 1.21.9 and 1.21.10 have bloom and gateway ect but it doesn't look as good nor work for items. **This mod does NOT require any shader loader/iris/sodium. It works fully by itself and does not affect you're whole game with shader effects.** ---
_Here's a short video showing off the mod this is the magma glint in my discord!_
--- Custom Glint lets you fully change how enchant glints look on items and armor, with separate item and armor glint selectors, an option to link them together so both update at once, and support for adding your own PNG glints through the custom glint folder with a rescan option so you can add your own glints. It also includes real shader-style overlays like End Gateway and Nether Portal that can be enabled separately for items and armor without replacing the normal glint, meaning you can stack a custom enchant glint with a gateway or portal effect on top. Both overlay types have controls for item strength, armor strength, background visibility, item background visibility, item speed, and item zoom, so you can make them subtle, bright, clean, very bright, or whatever style you want it to be like. The mod also has a full bloom system split between normal glints, End Gateway, and Nether Portal, with separate item and armor bloom toggles, intensity, spread, quality, dropped item strength, and dropped item spread. A big focus of the mod is Vulkan support, so the effects and bloom are made to work with Vulkan Mod instead of only working in normal Minecraft rendering like vanilla and sodium, while also being optimized so the bloom targets the glint and overlay effects instead of trying to glow the whole screen. If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow Join my Discord for more packs/mods!

Requires: YetAnotherConfigLib / YACL and Mod Menu

Settings / Features List
Section Settings What it does
Enchant Glint Link Item and Armor Glints, Item Glint Texture, Armor Glint Texture Lets items and armor use the same glint or separate glints, with built in glints and custom PNG glints loaded from the Custom Glint folder.
End Gateway Overlay Enable on Items, Enable on Armor, Armor Strength, Item Strength, Armor Background Visibility, Item Background Visibility, Item Glint Speed, Item Zoom Adds a real End Gateway style overlay on top of enchanted items and armor without replacing the normal enchant glint.
Nether Portal Overlay Enable on Items, Enable on Armor, Armor Strength, Item Strength, Armor Background Visibility, Item Background Visibility, Item Glint Speed, Item Zoom Adds a Nether Portal style overlay on top of enchanted items and armor without replacing the normal enchant glint.
Glint Bloom Bloom on Items, Bloom on Armor, Intensity, Spread, Dropped Item Strength, Dropped Item Spread, Quality Adds optimized bloom only from the regular enchant glint pixels instead of blooming the whole screen.
End Gateway Bloom Bloom on Items, Bloom on Armor, Intensity, Spread, Dropped Item Strength, Dropped Item Spread, Quality Adds separate bloom only from the End Gateway overlay, so it can glow independently from the normal glint.
Nether Portal Bloom Bloom on Items, Bloom on Armor, Intensity, Spread, Dropped Item Strength, Dropped Item Spread, Quality Adds separate bloom only from the Nether Portal overlay, so it can glow independently from the normal glint.
Custom Glints Open Glint Folder, Get More Glints, Rescan Glints Lets you drop PNG files into the glint folder, rescan them, and use them in the item and armor glint selectors without editing the jar.
Vulkan Support Optimized Vulkan compatible rendering and bloom Built to work with Vulkan Mod, including the custom overlays and bloom system.
